steps.title: Use the two binding limits
steps.content: For side lengths $8$, $13$, and $x$, the unknown side must be shorter than the sum of the other two sides and longer than their difference.

steps.title: Find the valid range
steps.content: Apply those two limits: $$ x<8+13 $$ $$ x>|13-8| $$ So the possible values satisfy $5C.
